nasb.text: Paul, looking intently at the Council, said, “Brethren, I have lived my life with a perfectly good conscience before God up to this day.”

esv.text: And looking intently at the council, Paul said, “Brothers, I have lived my life before God in all good conscience up to this day.”

cnv.text: 保羅定睛看著公議會的各人，說：“各位弟兄，我在　神面前，行事為人一向都是憑著良心的。”

ccb.text: 保罗注视着公会的人，说：“弟兄们，我在上帝面前行事为人一向问心无愧。”

csbs.text: 保罗注视着议会的人，说：“各位兄弟，直到今天，我在神面前，行事为人一向都凭着无愧的良心。”
